summary: Plumb cobra command context through the HTTP client: client.Client gains a Ctx field, client.do() switches from http.NewRequest to http.NewRequestWithContext, flags.newClient() takes a context argument, and all 218 call sites in internal/cli/*.go pass cmd.Context().
reason: Greptile P1 review finding on PR #676: long-running operations (sync, bulk paginated GETs) were unresponsive to Ctrl+C because in-flight HTTP requests didn't honour the command context. The fix is broad but mechanical — each call site changes from flags.newClient() to flags.newClient(cmd.Context()).
